steps.t: Shajât's former captain, Jidâlo, is outside the Broken Pillar Tavern in the Lower Ward.
The Ballast's former ship-mates can be found in the vicinity of the Broken Pillar Tavern, in the Lower Ward.
Shajât is outside the Lower Ward, in the Sail-haven.
Excited to begin his new life, Shajât agreed to meet you outside the Swain's Guild Hall in the Lower Ward.
Shajât stands outside the Swain's Guild Hall in the Lower Ward.
Shajât stands outside the Swain's Guild Hall in the Lower Ward.
